context.brief: Help a first-time AI coding agent user understand design-ai and reach a verified install or quickstart path from the first viewport.

notes: The report records only local P14 evidence produced from the approved homepage pilot.
Repository mutation, deployment, and external adoption claims remain outside this report.

sources.observation: Captured the rendered documentation homepage after the approved implementation.
Captured the 390 by 844 English mobile candidate.
Captured the 390 by 844 Korean mobile candidate.
Recorded responsive, keyboard, repeated-action, reduced-motion, contrast, and console observations.

lenses.summary: The first viewport states the product promise and exposes quickstart and distribution actions before detailed release content.

evidence.observation: The full hero and both actions end at 657 px in the 900 px desktop viewport.
The full hero and both actions end at 714 px in the 844 px mobile viewport.

lenses.summary: Search and navigation respond consistently across repeated keyboard and pointer cycles.

evidence.observation: Five search open-dismiss cycles and five drawer open-dismiss cycles completed without a stale state.

lenses.summary: The skip link moves focus to the page heading and the next keyboard step reaches the primary action in document order.

evidence.observation: Keyboard inspection confirmed skip-link destination, visible focus, and stable heading-to-action order.

lenses.summary: Search and drawer overlays can be opened and dismissed repeatedly without trapping input or leaving overlays active.

evidence.observation: Every repeated open-dismiss cycle returned to the page state.

lenses.summary: The hero introduces no blocking motion and honors reduced-motion settings.

evidence.observation: The reduced-motion profile reported zero-second hero and action animation and transition durations.

lenses.summary: The Pretendard request succeeds, while the local multilingual build still logs the pre-existing /ko/sitemap.xml 404.

evidence.observation: The previous font 403 is gone; the local sitemap warning remains visible and is not treated as resolved.

lenses.summary: Header controls have programmatic names, the skip link reaches a focusable heading, controls meet target size, and CTA contrast clears WCAG AA.

evidence.observation: Primary CTA contrast is 6.86 to 1, secondary CTA contrast is 16.07 to 1, action heights are 49.59 px, and focus uses a 3 px outline.
Static inspection reports no supported HTML accessibility findings.

lenses.summary: The English desktop, English mobile, and Korean mobile pages avoid horizontal overflow and keep the full action hero in the first viewport.

evidence.observation: The English 390 px viewport has matching document and viewport widths.
The Korean 390 px viewport has matching document and viewport widths and preserves both actions.

summary.nextAction: Preserve the local sitemap warning as an explicit limitation and verify the deployed Pages URL before making a public homepage quality claim.

requiredBefore: claiming external adoption or production quality
